description: You are the curriculum coordinator at Demo School preparing a new AP course for the spring semester in OpenSIS. Add Dr. Nathan Cruz (email: ncruz@demoschool.edu) as a staff member with the Teacher profile. Create the course AP Environmental Science (Code: APES101, Subject: Science, Grade Level: 11, Credits: 1.0). Set up a course section for this course assigned to Period 3 in Room 215 with a seat limit of 20, and assign Dr. Cruz as the section instructor. Enroll three pre-existing 11th-grade students into the section: Olivia Martinez, Ethan Park, and Sophia Williams. In the gradebook for this section, create an assignment category called 'Assessments' weighted at 50%. Then create an assignment called 'Baseline Assessment' under Assessments, worth 100 points. Enter Baseline Assessment scores: Olivia Martinez (89), Ethan Park (76), Sophia Williams (92). Record attendance for all three students on January 13, 2025: Olivia as Present, Ethan as Absent, Sophia as Present. Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: Admin@123
